title: TINYAT Holographic Clear Backpack Colorful Laser Transparent Backpack Large Clear Stadium Approved Bag for College, Concerts, Sports
features: 【High Quality】The clear backpack is made of PVC material, and the shoulder straps have air cushions, making it comfortable to wear for a day. We choose webbing straps that match the main color of the clear backpack, each connection point is triple stitched, soft and more durable than most backpacks on the market, it will not crack even in cold weather.

【Perfect Size】The Clear travel backpack measures 11.4*5.5*12.6inches (29*14*32cm) and weighs about 0.5kg, can accommodate a 14 inch laptop. The shoulder strap length is freely adjustable to the most comfortable position according to your height and body type, so it won't give you extra burden.

【Large Capacity】The heavy duty clear backpack has one main pocket, three external pockets and 2 side mesh pockets, one large compartment pocket, multi-pocket design can accommodate all the items needed for travel. Let books and daily necessities are well organized.

【Applicable Occasions】The transparent design of the clear backpack allows you to quickly find the items you need inside the bag, with a cute and smooth zipper, making this backpack popular among young people, it is suitable for a variety of occasions, including travel and outdoor activities.
【Note】When you need to use this large PVC backpack in temperatures below 68 °F, you can use a hair dryer or place this clear backpack in a warm, air-conditioned room to quickly restore its shape.
description: From the brand TINYAT——Work Better Together We are committed to researching people's lifestyle trends, searching for better materials and creating the highest quality products.
